language.welcome: Welcome! Choose a language to continue.

home.welcome: Welcome to Hear and See Safe. Choose a feature to begin.

voice.speak_command: Say a command. For example: Braille, picture book, number games, settings.

braille.title: Braille Alphabet
braille.intro: Braille learning for parents. Tap each letter or number to hear it. Learn the dots to support your blind child.
braille.for_parents: For parents: Learn Braille to communicate with your blind child. Tap any cell to hear the letter or number.

features.braille_desc: Learn Braille for parents of blind children
features.picture_book_desc: Multimedia picture book for visually impaired: large images, sounds, vibration and learning facts for ages up to 15
features.melody_memory_desc: Listen to a sequence of sounds and repeat it – like Simon Says
features.rhythm_tap_desc: Listen to the beats and tap in the same rhythm
features.story_choices_desc: Listen to a story and choose what happens next

picture_book.title: Learn & Listen
picture_book.intro: Learn and Listen. Picture book for visually impaired with large images. Tap for sound, vibration and a learning fact. Swipe left or right for next or previous page, or double tap next, triple tap previous.
picture_book.end_of_book: End of book. Well done! Starting from the beginning.
picture_book.long_press_hint: Long press to hear this page again.
picture_book.hint_nav: Swipe left or right for next or previous page. Double tap for next, triple tap for previous.
picture_book.cat_desc: A furry animal that says meow
picture_book.cat_learn: A cat has four legs and sees well in the dark. It catches mice.
picture_book.cat_learn2: When you hear meow outside, it may be a cat. Do not touch unknown animals without permission.
picture_book.dog_learn: The dog is people's loyal friend. It has a strong sense of smell.
picture_book.car_learn: A car moves with an engine. Always cross the street at a crosswalk.
picture_book.rain_learn: Rain waters plants. Wear rain clothes when it is cloudy.
picture_book.sun_learn: The sun gives us light and warmth. Do not look directly at the sun.
picture_book.tree_learn: Trees make oxygen for breathing. They give shelter to animals.
picture_book.bicycle_learn: Cycling is healthy and eco-friendly. Always wear a helmet and follow traffic rules.
picture_book.water_learn: Your body needs water to stay hydrated and focused. Drink water regularly, especially when studying or doing sports.
picture_book.water_learn2: Tap water is healthy to drink. If you feel thirsty, your body is reminding you: drink water.
picture_book.book_desc: Pages with text and pictures to read
picture_book.book_learn: Reading builds knowledge and imagination. Books and audiobooks are for everyone.
picture_book.fire_desc: Flames that give heat and light
picture_book.fire_learn: Never play with fire. In a fire, get out right away and call emergency 112.
picture_book.fire_learn2: If your clothes catch fire, stop, drop and roll. Call for help.
picture_book.phone_learn: Use the phone to stay in touch and in emergencies. Call 112 for emergency, or your local police and fire numbers.
picture_book.phone_learn2: Remember: 112 emergency. Call only when there is real danger. Say your name and where you are.

number_games.title: Number Games
number_games.what_number: What number is this? Enter it with the keyboard or tap the digits.
number_games.question: What is {0}?
number_games.choose_answer: Choose your answer or enter with the keyboard.
number_games.how_many_shapes: How many shapes do you see? Count them and enter the number.

camera.ready: Camera is ready. Point at an object to recognize.
camera.web_not_available: Camera is not available on web. Please use the mobile app.
camera.combination_tip: Combination tip: this colour goes well with white, grey or beige. Versatile for teens.
camera.combination_tip_dark: Tip: dark colours combine well with white or pastels.
camera.combination_tip_light: Tip: light colours are versatile and easy to combine.

spatial.title: Spatial orientation
spatial.full_instruction: On a flat surface, walk 5 steps forward, then turn left, 3 steps forward, turn right, 2 steps forward and stop. Use the keyboard arrows or the on-screen buttons.
spatial.use_arrows_hint: Arrow up: forward. Left: turn left. Right: turn right. Down: stop.
spatial.incorrect: Incorrect. That was not the next step. Try again.

sound.what_is_this: What is this sound? Choose from the buttons below.

cyber.question1: Should you share your personal information online?
cyber.explanation1: Never share personal information like your address, phone number, or password online. Always ask a parent or teacher first.
cyber.question2: What should you do if a stranger messages you?
cyber.option2b: Tell a parent or teacher and don't reply
cyber.explanation2: If a stranger messages you online, never reply. Always tell a parent or teacher immediately.
cyber.question3: Is it okay to meet someone you met online in person?
cyber.option3a: No, never meet strangers from online
cyber.option3c: Only if they are your age
cyber.explanation3: Never meet someone you met online in person without a parent or teacher present. It's not safe.
cyber.question4: What should you do if someone is being mean to you online?
cyber.option4b: Tell a parent or teacher and block them
cyber.explanation4: If someone is being mean or bullying you online, tell a parent or teacher right away and block that person.
cyber.results: Quiz complete! You got {0} out of {1} correct.

sound_memory.start: Audio memory. Instead of cards you hear sounds. Find the pairs with the same sound.
sound_memory.instructions: Tap one card to hear its sound. Then tap another. If they are the same sound — it's a match! If not — try again.
sound_memory.no_match: Not the same sound. Try again.
sound_memory.win: Congratulations! You found all pairs in {0} moves!

pong.title: Voice Pong
pong.instructions: Ping-pong with sound. The ball is heard as it moves — tap the screen at the right moment to hit. Vibrations get more frequent as the ball approaches.
pong.start: Game started! Listen for vibrations or voice. Tap when the ball is coming.
pong.miss: Missed. Next time tap when you hear the ball close.

melody.win: You finished the whole game! Amazing!

rhythm.your_turn: Your turn. Tap {0} times in rhythm.
rhythm.win: You finished the whole game! Well done!
rhythm.tap_area: Tap here to tap in rhythm

story.intro: Story – your choice. Listen and choose what happens.
story.all_done: All stories finished! Well done! Tap to play again.
story.s1_text: Anna goes to the park. She sees a big tree and a swing. Should she swing or pick flowers?
story.s1_out1: Anna swung and smiled. The air was fresh and it was a lovely day.
story.s1_out2: Anna picked pretty flowers and gave them to Mom. Mom was very happy.
story.s2_text: Mark is thirsty. Should he get water from the fountain or look for juice?
story.s2_out1: Mark drank water and felt better right away. Water is the healthiest.
story.s2_out2: Mark found juice and shared it with his friend. Both were happy.
story.s3_text: Sonia wants to read a book. Should she get a book about animals or about space?
story.s3_out1: Sonia read about lions and elephants. She wanted to see them at the zoo.
story.s3_out2: Sonia read about stars and planets. She wanted to become an astronaut.
